posts.author: jen.johanningsharpe (Jen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Is there a way to restrict the dates on the resource planner? The scroll bar at the bottom is very touchy and can send you back into the 1900s very easily.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be nice to limit the scrolling to the start date and forward 5 years max.
